ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "crime_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area where the crime trend is occurring */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of the crime trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_pattern_analyses" (
  "crime_pattern_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime pattern analysis */,
  "crime_trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime trend being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_pattern_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_pattern_analyses_crime_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_trend_id") REFERENCES crime_trends ("crime_trend_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each crime trend
ID of the area where the crime trend is occurring
Timestamp when the crime trend record was created
Timestamp when the crime trend record was last updated
Unique identifier for each crime pattern analysis
ID of the crime trend being analyzed
Date when the analysis was performed
Timestamp when the analysis record was created
Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated
